recommendations.title: Copycat
recommendations.overview: An agoraphobic psychologist and a female detective must work together to take down a serial killer who copies serial killers from the past.

recommendations.title: The Man Who Knew Too Little
recommendations.overview: An American gets a ticket for an audience participation game in London, then gets involved in a case of mistaken identity. As an international plot unravels around him, he thinks it's all part of the act.

recommendations.title: Creation

recommendations.title: Sommersby

recommendations.title: Enola Holmes
recommendations.overview: While searching for her missing mother, intrepid teen Enola Holmes uses her sleuthing skills to outsmart big brother Sherlock and help a runaway lord.

recommendations.title: The Core

recommendations.title: Trivisa
recommendations.overview: Hong Kong's three notorious thieves who have never met one another before appear in the same restaurant. This leads to a rumour that they are joining forces to pull off something big before the Handover, though this is not something that any of them.
recommendations.director: Vicky Wong Wai-Kit, Frank Hui, Jevons Au Man-Kit

recommendations.title: How to Marry a Millionaire
recommendations.overview: Three women set out to find eligible millionaires to marry, but find true love in the process.

recommendations.title: Infinity Chamber
recommendations.overview: A man trapped in an automated prison must outsmart a computer in order to escape and try and find his way back to the outside world that may already be wiped out.

recommendations.title: The Lake House
